name: curator-copilot-tools
description: Exposes Curator MCP tools to GitHub Copilot agent

curator.serverUrl.description: URL of the running Curator MCP HTTP server

curator.configPath.description: Path to curator config.yaml passed to each tool

languageModelTools.name: curator_init
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read config.yaml and clone the configured Curator source repository. Call this first before using list, read, or transfer.

config_path.description: Optional path to config.yaml. Defaults to the extension setting.

languageModelTools.name: curator_list
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Return a manifest of files available in the configured Curator clone directory, filtered by include/exclude rules in config.

files.description: Optional list of specific files to validate. If omitted, returns the full manifest.

metadata.description: Optional key-value metadata to include in the response.

languageModelTools.name: curator_read
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read the UTF-8 text content of a single Curator file. The file must pass the include/exclude config rules.

file.description: Path of the file to read (must be in the curator clone directory)

languageModelTools.name: curator_transfer
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Copy listed Curator files to a destination folder. Files must appear in the list output first.

destination_folder.description: Default destination folder for copied files

files.description: Files to transfer. Each entry needs a source file path and an optional per-file destination.

destination.description: Optional destination path override for this file
